extension.name: Agent Consent and Adherence Protocol
extension.description: Versioned, machine-readable usage-policy adherence layer for A2A agents.

document_uri.description: HTTPS URL where the PolicyDocument JSON is hosted.
document_uri.title: Document Uri

document_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the current PolicyDocument. Format: 'sha256:<hex>'.
document_hash.title: Document Hash

effective_date.description: ISO 8601 UTC datetime from which this version is effective.
effective_date.title: Effective Date

acceptance_required.description: Whether callers MUST complete the ACAP consent handshake before invoking any skill.
acceptance_required.title: Acceptance Required

acceptance_endpoint.description: HTTPS endpoint at which callers POST a ConsentRecord. REQUIRED when acceptance_required is true.
acceptance_endpoint.title: Acceptance Endpoint

supersedes.description: Semver of the previous PolicyDocument version.
supersedes.title: Supersedes

change_summary.description: One-line summary of material changes for agent reasoning.
change_summary.title: Change Summary

natural_language_uri.description: HTTPS URL of the human-readable Terms of Service.
natural_language_uri.title: Natural Language Uri

agent_card_payload_schema.title: UsagePolicyRef

invariants: Records form an append-only linked chain per agent-pair per policy version.
Caller MUST parse every PolicyClaim before invoking any skill.
